mainEntity.name: What if AI changes break my Houston AEO?
mainEntity.text: What if AI changes break my Houston AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Adapt Houston AEO to AI updates by monitoring GSC, diversifying content formats quarterly.[1][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Google AI evolutions require flexibility—test new schemas. Houston energy lawyers pivot to video FAQs. Resilience via multi-channel beats single reliance.[4]

name: Handling AI Changes to Houston AEO
description: Adapt Houston AEO to AI updates by monitoring GSC, diversifying content formats quarterly.[1][4]
